name: United Parks & Resorts Inc.
business: United Parks & Resorts Inc. is a leading theme park and entertainment company that owns or licenses a portfolio of recognized brands including SeaWorld, Busch Gardens, Aquatica, Discovery Cove and Sesame Place. It generates revenue primarily from selling admission to its theme parks and from purchases of food, merchandise and other items within its parks. The company operates 13 differentiated theme parks in key markets across the United States and in the United Arab Emirates.

exposures.sentence: We own or license a portfolio of recognized brands including SeaWorld, Busch Gardens, Aquatica, Discovery Cove and Sesame Place.

Our theme parks showcase our one-of-a-kind zoological collection and feature a diverse array of both thrill and family-friendly rides, educational presentations, shows and/or other attractions

catalysts.event: Opening of SEAQuest: Legends of the Deep at SeaWorld Orlando
catalysts.sentence: This includes the following new rides and attractions expected to open in 2026: SEAQuest: Legends of the Deep (SeaWorld Orlando): Guests will embark on a vibrant submersible adventure through undersea ecosystems, where they'll encounter extraordinary lifeforms, breathtaking environments, and inspiring stories of the sea.

catalysts.event: Opening of Barracuda Strike at SeaWorld San Antonio
catalysts.sentence: Barracuda Strike (SeaWorld San Antonio): Texas' first inverted family coaster invites guests of all ages to dive into the deep and experience one of the ocean's most agile predator.

catalysts.event: Opening of Lion & Hyena Ridge at Busch Gardens Tampa Bay
catalysts.sentence: Lion & Hyena Ridge (Busch Gardens Tampa Bay): An expanded and reimagined area of the park increases the existing space to more than double its previous size, creating nearly 35,000 square feet of dynamic savanna terrain where two of Africa's most iconic species will thrive - a pride of five young male lions and a pair of playful hyenas.

catalysts.event: Opening of Verbolten - Forbidden Turn at Busch Gardens Williamsburg
catalysts.sentence: Verbolten - Forbidden Turn (Busch Gardens Williamsburg): A re-imagined indoor/outdoor multi-launch roller coaster opening this spring with new immersive storytelling and special effects.

catalysts.event: Refresh of Shark Encounter at SeaWorld San Diego
catalysts.sentence: Shark Encounter refresh (SeaWorld San Diego): A re-imagined and immersive version of the Shark Encounter as part of the 'Fin Shui' project.
